CustomField.description: Aggregates all credit payment amounts converted into the Ledger currency using the original invoice exchange rate.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(leaseworks__Multicurrency_Enabled__c), leaseworks__Availed_Credit_Number__c, IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c), NULL, IF( leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c = 0, 0, leaseworks__Availed_Credit_Number__c* leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the total amount of payments applied as credits to this invoice, shown in the company’s reporting (Ledger) currency.
CustomField.label: Total Amount Credited (Ledger)
